name: swarm
description: swarm — fan a task out across a team of parallel coding agents via `agents teams` (the modern replacement for the deprecated Swarmify MCP). `/swarm:run` is the generic fan-out — decompose an arbitrary goal into independent tracks, spawn a mixed team, monitor, and synthesize (the catch-all for work that doesn't fit the specialized modes); `/swarm:plan` researches hard and drafts an OpenSpec-grade change proposal, then has independent agents plan it blind and reconciles; `/swarm:debug` traces the data path and confirms the root cause with blind, different-provider verifiers (scaled to the bug) before any fix; `/swarm:test` splits a scope into areas and covers each in parallel; `/swarm:qa` maps an app's QA surface, provisions instances on multiple ports, and fans QA agents across them in waves via `agents browser`, then ranks a ship/no-ship verdict. Each command invokes its same-named skill; the shared `agents teams` engine (provider discovery, boundary contracts, judgment-based sizing) lives in the internal `swarm:orchestrate` skill.
